task_completion.description: Agent accesses the Mobile Banking App project wiki.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the web interface for the 'Mobile Banking App' project, specifically navigated to the Wiki module.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a new wiki page titled 'Technical Documentation'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A wiki page titled 'Technical Documentation' is visible in the page editor or as a successfully published page.

task_completion.description: Agent adds the {{toc}} macro to the 'Technical Documentation' page content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '{{toc}}' is visible in the content editor for the 'Technical Documentation' page, or a rendered Table of Contents box is visible on the published page.

task_completion.description: Agent configures 'System Architecture' to be a child of 'Technical Documentation'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wiki navigation sidebar shows 'System Architecture' indented under 'Technical Documentation', or the page's parent setting dropdown shows 'Technical Documentation'.

task_completion.description: Agent configures 'API Endpoints' to be a child of 'Technical Documentation'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wiki navigation sidebar shows 'API Endpoints' indented under 'Technical Documentation', or the page's parent setting dropdown shows 'Technical Documentation'.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to interact with the application, rather than using API scripts in the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is open and active, showing the application interface. The terminal is not the primary tool used to complete the task.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual project management application, not a local text editor or mock interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application's UI elements (sidebar, top navigation, wiki editor) are clearly visible and interacted with.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to directly modify the database or run backend scripts to restructure the wiki.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands, rails console, or curl requests to the application API.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project identifier is 'mobile-banking-app'. The new parent page must be titled 'Technical Documentation' and contain the macro '{{toc}}'. The existing pages 'System Architecture' and 'API Endpoints' must be moved to become child pages of 'Technical Documentation'.
